case_title: FORSYTHE FINANCE LLC VS. MANISHA S JONES ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-30-2020 CONTINUED TO SEP-01-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-01-2020 CONTINUED TO NOV-17-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-17-2020 CONTINUED TO JAN-05-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200022511) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $316.76 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 200026449) AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, MANISHA S AN INDIVIDUAL
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 200027566)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-05-2021 CONTINUED TO MAR-09-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FORSYTHE FINANCE LLC AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, MANISHA S AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-27-2020
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-11-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FORSYTHE FINANCE LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JONES, MANISHA S AN INDIVIDUAL $5,398.98 PRINCIPAL, $316.76 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,715.74, SEE SCANNED DOC
DECLARATION OF REASONABLE DILIGENCE (TRANSACTION ID # 200005608) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FORSYTHE FINANCE LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-30-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200015868), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF FORSYTHE FINANCE LLC SERVED AUG-31-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE SEP-03-2020 AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, MANISHA S AN INDIVIDUAL
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 200022511) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF FORSYTHE FINANCE LLC AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, MANISHA S AN INDIVIDUAL
DECLARATION OF PAUL Q. GOYETTE WAIVING ATTORNEY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 200024064) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FORSYTHE FINANCE LLC
